title: Traffic Sign Detection System
description: Real-time detection of traffic signs using YOLOv8, MobileNet, and ResNet models deployed on a web interface with live video processing support.

title: Gemini Health AI Assistant
description: An AI-powered healthcare assistant that provides wellness recommendations based on health stats and user queries, using Gemini Pro API.

title: Medical Chatbot System
description: An end-to-end medical chatbot using LangChain, Pinecone, and LLMs for accurate information retrieval and conversation.

title: FoodHub - Complete Platform
description: A high-performance food delivery platform with advanced features like secure checkout, order tracking, and provider dashboard.

title: Vehicle Rental System
description: Industy-grade vehicle rental platform with Dependency Injection, Swagger documentation, and robust middleware storage.

title: EduBridge - Learning Platform
description: A comprehensive educational learning platform enabling students to access courses and track their academic journey.
